sections.name: Responsory11
lines: R. Alleluia, behold we have heard of it in Ephrata: we have found it in the fields of the wood.
* We will go into his tabernacle: we will adore in the place where his feet stood, alleluia, alleluia.
V. Arise, O Lord, into thy resting place: you and the ark, which you have sanctified.
R. We will go into his tabernacle: we will adore in the place where his feet stood, alleluia, alleluia.

sections.name: Responsory12
lines: R. Make me to go in the path of thy commandments, alleluia, for therein is my desire, alleluia.
* Incline my heart unto thy testimonies, alleluia, alleluia, alleluia.
V. O turn away mine eyes lest they behold vanity, and quicken thou me in thy way.
R. Incline my heart unto thy testimonies, alleluia, alleluia, alleluia.
